summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CampusMart C2C rental marketplace. Backend APIs fully functional (15/15 tests passed). Frontend UI loads and navigation works, but critical HTTPS/HTTP mixed content issue prevents API calls from working in production.

critical_bugs.issue: Mixed Content Error - Frontend making HTTP requests instead of HTTPS to backend API
critical_bugs.details: Browser blocks HTTP requests from HTTPS pages. All API calls fail with 'Mixed Content' error
critical_bugs.impact: Complete API integration failure - no data loading

ui_bugs.issue: Logout redirects to /auth instead of home page
ui_bugs.impact: Minor UX issue - functionality works correctly

integration_issues.issue: No data loading due to mixed content policy blocking HTTP requests

success_percentage.frontend_integration: 0% (0/6 API integration tests passed due to mixed content)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix mixed content issue - Frontend is making HTTP requests instead of HTTPS to backend API. Environment variable REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is set correctly to HTTPS, but runtime requests are still HTTP. This completely blocks all API functionality. Investigate build configuration, environment variable loading, or potential hardcoded HTTP URLs.
